346 MATH - Mathematics

MATH121 Elementary Calculus II (3 Credits)

Trigonometric functions, techniques of integration, infinite series, differential equations, probability.

Prerequisite: MATH120, MATH130, MATH136, or MATH140.

Restriction: Not open to students majoring in mathematics, engineering, the biological sciences, biochemistry, chemistry, or the physical sciences; Must not have completed MATH141 with a grade of C- or higher. Formerly: MATH221.
